# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.

	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = { is_subject_type = colonial_nation  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	
	global_population_growth = 0.002
}

	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = { is_subject_type = colonial_nation  always = no} # M8 disables vanilla
	
	global_monthly_development = 0.005 # WAD, decision by johan
}

}
